meaning: n.<澳新俚>女郎,少女 Sheila 希拉(女子名)
examples: Sheila and Jim were the first to arrive.
Sheila had come to dinner in a black jersey top.
Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee, D-Texas, called on Wilson to go to the floor Thursday and apologize.
CNN's Sheila MacVicar said the latest blasts displayed a change in tactics by Palestinian militants.
